allow:
Bash(cd /c/Users/User/mumrated && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: delete \(mum\)/page.tsx to resolve parallel route conflict at /

Next.js forbids two route groups resolving to the same path.
\(landing\)/page.tsx now owns / exclusively; homepage is at /home.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main && git push vercel main 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/User/mumrated && git add src/app/api/health/route.ts && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
feat: add /api/health liveness endpoint for uptime monitors

Returns { ok: true, timestamp } with HTTP 200.
Documented in LAUNCH_CHECKLIST.md — configure Better Stack or
UptimeRobot to hit this URL every 3-5 minutes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git tag v0.9.1 && git push origin main && git push vercel main && git push origin v0.9.1 && git push vercel v0.9.1 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/User/mumrated && git add prisma/seed.ts src/app/\\\(mum\\\)/home/page.tsx src/components/layout/NavBar.tsx && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: replace individual paediatricians with paediatric hospitals in seed; add stamp logo to NavBar

Seed data:
- Category display name: "Paediatricians" → "Paediatric Hospitals"
- Listing 1: Dr. Amaka Osei → Lagoon Hospital Victoria Island, Lagos
- Listing 2: Dr. Chukwu Paediatrics → Cedarcrest Hospitals, Abuja
- Reviews rewritten to reflect hospital experience \(facilities, emergency
  ward, paediatric consultants, child-friendly environment\)

Homepage:
- Featured category chip: label "Paediatricians" → "Paediatric Hospitals", icon 👩‍⚕️ → 🏥

NavBar:
- Added logo-stamp.png image alongside the wordmark \(mix-blend-mode: multiply
  removes white PNG background on the cream nav bar\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main && git push vercel main 2>&1)

Bash(cd /c/Users/User/mumrated && git add src/middleware.ts "src/app/\(auth\)/sign-in/SignInForm.tsx" && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: handle Verification error, fix callbackUrl default, protect review route in middleware

SignInForm:
- Add explicit Verification error message: "That link has expired or has
  already been used. Enter your email below to get a fresh one."
  Previously fell through to Default \("Something went sideways"\) which
  gave no guidance when a magic link callback failed.
- Improve Default message: "Sign-in didn't complete. Please try again."
- Fix callbackUrl default: "/" → "/home" so post-sign-in lands on the
  app, not the marketing landing page.
- Remove em dashes from error messages.

Middleware:
- Protect /listing/[slug]/review — unauthenticated users are now
  redirected to /sign-in?callbackUrl=... by the middleware \(clean, no
  error param\) rather than by the server component after the page loads.

Note: AUTH_URL=https://mumrated.com must still be set in Vercel env vars
to prevent magic link callbacks from failing with Verification errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push origin main && git push vercel main 2>&1)
